reports.thesis: ema20_slope -0.011 + ema50_slope < 0 = price below falling EMAs; adx 27 (-DI > +DI) = strong DOWN trend, do not fade; rejected the swing_high and breaking the support shelf (dist_to_swing_low_pct 0.02); rsi 38 falling, no bullish divergence.
Price above rising EMAs (ema20_slope +0.009); adx 24 with +DI leading = building up-trend; holding above the swing_low; rsi 58 with room.
